notes: The codebase satisfies criteria 1–43 at the code level. Only the automated verifier is blocked: agentloop.toml still uses bare `python`. Once the runner is pointed at the venv (task 111), backend pytest + test_clinic_flow.py execute and criteria 15 & 42 are provably green. Task 112 sweeps the two soft gaps (RBAC negative tests, Skeleton audit report). Task 113 runs one final full-stack verification and declares done.

tasks.title: Point agentloop.toml at the venv-based pytest
tasks.description:
Edit `agentloop.toml` at repo root. Change both the top-level `test_command` and the `[[project.tests]]` entry named 'backend' so pytest is invoked via the venv that already exists at `dentacrm/backend/.venv/bin/python`. Concretely:

  - `[[project.tests]] backend.command` → `./.venv/bin/python -m pytest --tb=short -q` (cwd stays `dentacrm/backend`).
  - `test_command` → `cd dentacrm/backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest --tb=short -q && cd ../frontend && npm run test -- --run`.

Also add a fallback: if `.venv` is missing, fall back to `python3 -m pytest`. Do NOT touch anything under `dentacrm/`. This is a one-line configuration change that unblocks the whole verification loop.

After the edit, run `./dentacrm/backend/.venv/bin/python -m pytest --tb=short -q` from `dentacrm/backend` and paste the summary. Every test module (17 files) must be collected; all must be green. If any test fails, that failure is the real work — investigate and fix root cause; do NOT skip or xfail without justification.
tasks.acceptance: 1) `agentloop.toml` diff shows the venv-based interpreter for the backend test step. 2) `cd dentacrm/backend && ./.venv/bin/python -m pytest --tb=short -q` exits 0. 3) `test_clinic_flow.py` is in the collected set and passes. 4) The next automated test run in the loop reports backend=✅ instead of `bash: line 1: python: command not found`.

tasks.title: Close the two soft gaps (RBAC negative matrix + Skeleton audit)
tasks.description:
Two small, orthogonal deliverables:

(a) BACKEND — audit RBAC coverage. For each row in the PROJECT_BRIEF RBAC table, confirm at least one pytest asserts 403 for a denied role. Concretely add or extend `tests/test_accounts.py` with a parametrised `test_rbac_matrix` that hits: POST /departments/ (denied: doctor, administrator), POST /doctors/ (denied: doctor, administrator), POST /treatments/ (denied: administrator), GET /reports/dashboard/ (denied: doctor, administrator). Use existing factory_boy fixtures. If any of these matrix cells already has a dedicated test elsewhere, add a comment linking to it instead of duplicating.

(b) FRONTEND — Skeleton/Toast/EmptyState audit. Grep `frontend/src/pages/*.tsx` for `isPending`, `isLoading`, `isError` and `data?.results?.length === 0`. For every page, confirm one of: `<Skeleton>` in the loading branch, `useToast()`/notificationStore push in the error branch, `<EmptyState>` in the empty branch. Any page missing one of the three MUST be fixed. Write the audit summary as a Markdown table in `dentacrm/frontend/docs/ui-audit.md` (create the `docs/` folder if absent) so criterion 30/34 can be re-verified without re-grep.

Do not touch any page that already complies. Keep changes minimal.
tasks.acceptance: 1) `tests/test_accounts.py::test_rbac_matrix` (or a new file) covers every row of the RBAC table with parametrised assertions; full pytest still green. 2) `frontend/docs/ui-audit.md` exists and lists every page under `src/pages/` with a ✅/⚠️ column for Loading/Error/Empty. Any ⚠️ in the audit corresponds to a diff that adds the missing component. 3) vitest still 41/41 green.

tasks.title: Full-stack green-light run and declare done
tasks.description:
Run the complete verification sequence and paste the results:

  1. `make backend-lint`           → ruff green
  2. `make backend-check`          → `manage.py check` green
  3. `make backend-test`           → all pytest tests green (must include test_clinic_flow)
  4. `make frontend-lint`          → eslint green
  5. `make frontend-typecheck`     → tsc green
  6. `make frontend-test`          → all vitest tests green
  7. `make frontend-build`         → vite build green
  8. `docker compose -f dentacrm/docker-compose.yml config >/dev/null` → dev compose valid
  9. `docker compose -f dentacrm/docker-compose.prod.yml config >/dev/null` → prod compose valid (after `cp .env.prod.example .env` inside dentacrm/)

Do NOT attempt to run `make frontend-e2e` on the orchestrator host if chromium is not installed — the CI job handles that. Instead, confirm the Playwright config parses via `cd dentacrm/frontend && npx playwright test --list` (returns the two spec titles without running them).

When every command exits 0, add a one-line entry to `dentacrm/README.md` under a new `## Verification log` section noting the date and a short commit hash, then flip `done=true` in the next plan.
tasks.acceptance: All 9 commands exit 0 in one contiguous session. Output pasted in the builder's report so the reviewer can verify. README has a verification log entry. Next plan sets `done=true`.
